title: Chicken Vindaloo Italian Fusion
description: A unique blend of Italian and Indian flavors, this dish combines the spices of vindaloo with the richness of Italian chicken.

ingredients.name: vindaloo spice mix
ingredients.notes: Available at most Indian grocery stores

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the Italian seasoning, vindaloo spice mix, garlic, and onion to the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add the chicken broth to the skillet and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and let the chicken cook for 10-12 minutes, or until cooked through.
Stir in the tomatoes and basil.
Serve the chicken over pasta, topped with parmesan cheese.
